stdin.name: write_chunks
stdin.doc:
Write stdin chunks to a file, one line at a time.
Each iteration: read a line from stdin, write it as a chunk to the file.
Exits on EOF (Ctrl+D).

stdin.name: read_message
stdin.doc:
Read one framed message from stdin.
Parses the Content-Length header, skips the blank separator line,
then reads exactly that many bytes from stdin.

stdin.name: repl
stdin.doc:
Read stdin lines and echo them back, one chunk at a time.
Each iteration: print prompt, read a line, echo it.
Exits when called with Exit or on process termination.
